languages.text: "Себериан фон Валанциус. Святейший покровитель 32-го меровского, а нынче зарковского полка. Герой легенд и песен". {n}Иждриг отвешивает кривобокий поклон.{/n} "Даже представить не мог, что увижу вас вживую".
"Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."
languages.original_text: "Себериан фон Валанциус. Святейший покровитель 32-го меровского, а нынче зарковского полка. Герой легенд и песен". {n}Иждриг отвешивает кривобокий поклон.{/n} "Даже представить не мог, что увижу вас вживую".

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."
"Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."
"Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."
"Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius. Hochheiliger Patron des 32. Merov, dem heutigen Zarkov-Regiment. Ein Held der Legenden und Lieder." {n}Izdrig macht eine tiefe Verbeugung."{/n} Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich Euch einmal persönlich treffen würde."
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Hochheiliger Patron des 32. Merov, dem heutigen Zarkov-Regiment. Ein Held der Legenden und Lieder." {n}Izdrig macht eine tiefe Verbeugung."{/n} Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass ich Euch einmal persönlich treffen würde."

languages.text: « Seberian von Valancius. Saint protecteur du 32e régiment de Merov, devenu Zarkov. Héros de nos légendes et de nos chansons. {n}Izdrig tente une révérence bancale.{/n} Je n'aurais jamais cru vous voir un jour de mes propres yeux. »
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: « Seberian von Valancius. Saint protecteur du 32e régiment de Merov, devenu Zarkov. Héros de nos légendes et de nos chansons. {n}Izdrig tente une révérence bancale.{/n} Je n'aurais jamais cru vous voir un jour de mes propres yeux. »

languages.text: «Seberian von Valancius. Sagrado patrón del 32.º regimiento de Merov, ahora de Zarkov. El héroe de nuestras leyendas y canciones». {n}Izdrig le ofrece una reverencia ladeada.{/n} «No pensaba que llegaría a encontrarme con usted».
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: «Seberian von Valancius. Sagrado patrón del 32.º regimiento de Merov, ahora de Zarkov. El héroe de nuestras leyendas y canciones». {n}Izdrig le ofrece una reverencia ladeada.{/n} «No pensaba que llegaría a encontrarme con usted».

languages.text: "Seberian von Valancius. 32. Merov, diğer adıyla Zarkov Alayı'nın kutsal hamisi. Efsanelerin ve şarkıların kahramanı." {n}İzdrig, çarpık bir şekilde eğilerek selam veriyor.{/n} "Sizi kanlı canlı görebileceğimi hiç düşünmemiştim."
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: "Seberian von Valancius. 32. Merov, diğer adıyla Zarkov Alayı'nın kutsal hamisi. Efsanelerin ve şarkıların kahramanı." {n}İzdrig, çarpık bir şekilde eğilerek selam veriyor.{/n} "Sizi kanlı canlı görebileceğimi hiç düşünmemiştim."

languages.text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。梅罗夫第32团，也就是如今的扎尔科夫团，最神圣的庇护者。传说与歌谣中的英雄。”{n}伊兹德里格歪歪扭扭地鞠了一躬。{/n}“我做梦都没想到可以见到您本人。”
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯。梅罗夫第32团，也就是如今的扎尔科夫团，最神圣的庇护者。传说与歌谣中的英雄。”{n}伊兹德里格歪歪扭扭地鞠了一躬。{/n}“我做梦都没想到可以见到您本人。”

languages.text: 「シベリアンの・フォン・ヴァランキウス。32番目のメローフ連隊、今はザルコフ連隊の最も聖なる守護神。伝説と歌に歌われる英雄。」{n}イズドリックは片膝をついて頭を下げる。{/n}「まさか、あなたに会えるとは思わなかった。」
languages.original_text: "Seberian von Valancius. Most holy patron of the 32nd Merov, now Zarkov, Regiment. A hero of legends and songs." {n}Izdrig offers a lopsided bow.{/n} "I never imagined I would see you in the flesh."

traits.locale_text: 「シベリアンの・フォン・ヴァランキウス。32番目のメローフ連隊、今はザルコフ連隊の最も聖なる守護神。伝説と歌に歌われる英雄。」{n}イズドリックは片膝をついて頭を下げる。{/n}「まさか、あなたに会えるとは思わなかった。」
